name: htop
description: Interactive process viewer for Unix systems with a rich terminal UI

globalOptions.name: --delay
globalOptions.description: Update interval in tenths of seconds (e.g., 10 = 1 second)

globalOptions.name: --user
globalOptions.description: Show only processes of a given user

globalOptions.name: --pid
globalOptions.description: Show only the given PIDs (comma-separated list)

globalOptions.name: --sort-key
globalOptions.description: Sort by specified column (e.g., PERCENT_CPU, PERCENT_MEM, TIME)

globalOptions.name: --no-unicode
globalOptions.description: Do not use Unicode drawing characters

globalOptions.name: --highlight-threads
globalOptions.description: Highlight threads with a different color

globalOptions.name: --readonly
globalOptions.description: Disable all system and process changing features (kill, renice, etc.)

globalOptions.name: --drop-capabilities
globalOptions.description: Drop unneeded Linux capabilities (when running with elevated privileges)

examples.description: Monitor a specific process by PID
Monitor multiple PIDs in tree view
Run without mouse and Unicode support

detectors.name: running
detectors.description: Check if htop is currently running
